zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH价格运行在2050附近，整体位于2074的20日均线下方，短线趋势偏弱，呈震荡整理结构，多空暂时僵持，成交量略有萎缩，缺乏上行动能，市场情绪偏谨慎短期或延续弱势震荡中。

MACD为负值运行，空头动能仍占优，价格反弹缺乏持续性，若无法站稳2065上方，短线仍以回落为主信号偏弱，动能修复仍需观察谨慎操作为主。

下方关键支撑位于2050附近，若跌破或下探2030区域；上方阻力集中在2069至2075均线区间，突破前需放量确认若跌破支撑可能加速回撤注意风险控制操作。

以太坊短线建议保持观望或高抛低吸，未有效突破2070前不宜追多，回踩2050附近可关注低吸机会，严格止损控制风险等待确认方向再操作为主短。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum remains under mild bearish pressure after slipping below the 20-day simple moving average near 2074, with price currently trading around 2053. The inability to reclaim the short-term moving average suggests momentum has weakened following recent consolidation attempts. Sellers appear active near the 2065–2070 zone, while downside movement has stayed relatively controlled. The narrow daily range also reflects hesitation among market participants, indicating that traders are waiting for a stronger catalyst before committing to larger directional positions.

The MACD reading at -6.79 reinforces the current negative momentum structure, showing that bearish momentum still outweighs bullish participation in the short term. Although the RSI reading is unavailable, price behavior around the session low near 2052 implies oversold conditions have not yet fully developed. If Ethereum continues trading beneath the SMA(20), sentiment may remain cautious. However, the relatively shallow 24-hour decline of 0.78% suggests bears are not aggressively dominating the market despite the weak technical setup.

Immediate support is forming near 2050, which aligns closely with the current daily low. A breakdown beneath this level could expose additional downside toward the psychologically important 2025 region, followed by stronger support near 2000. On the upside, resistance remains concentrated around 2070 and the SMA(20) near 2074. A sustained move above that zone would improve short-term sentiment and could open the path toward 2100. Until that occurs, rallies may continue facing selling pressure from short-term traders.

For active traders, the current environment favors cautious positioning and disciplined risk management. Short-term bearish setups may remain attractive while price trades below 2074, especially if momentum indicators continue weakening. Conservative traders may prefer waiting for either a confirmed rebound above resistance or a cleaner breakdown below 2050 before entering new positions. Volatility remains relatively compressed, so breakout strategies could become increasingly relevant if Ethereum exits the current consolidation range with stronger directional volume.
